title: MapReduce Task Management
description: The 'task' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture is responsible for managing and processing reduce tasks. It employs multi-threaded components such as 'EventFetcher', 'Fetcher', 'MergeThread', and 'OnDiskMapOutput' for concurrent merge operations, ensuring efficient task execution. Collaboration with 'TaskTracker', 'ShuffleScheduler', 'ExceptionReporter', and 'MergeManager' ensures seamless data transfer and processing. The 'Shuffle' class manages the shuffle process, while 'ShuffleClientMetrics' tracks shuffle client performance. This directory implements a multi-threaded, collaborative architectural pattern for effective reduce phase in Hadoop MapReduce jobs.
